notes: Compound noun: Wetter (weather) + Vorhersage (forecast/prediction). Synonym: Wetterprognose.

sentences.german: Laut der Wettervorhersage soll es morgen regnen.
sentences.english: According to the weather forecast, it is supposed to rain tomorrow.

sentences.german: Die Wettervorhersagen für das Wochenende sind leider nicht sehr gut.
sentences.english: The weather forecasts for the weekend are unfortunately not very good.
